comment.body:
nah... trading is about probability.
this is not a furu discord service. 
this is quantitative analyst service.
my job is to detect the key levels and ranges that actually matter, 
assign dynamics, continuations that can be expected.
not to put a bias into your head to make you lose objectivity.
ok?

nobody hedges anything.
I'm not playing this "who is right" game ;)) bye
